---
title: "Elastic Net Analysis"
output: pdf_document
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "02/17/2026"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
.libPaths("~/leidholt/R")
```

```{r}
#load packages
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)
```

```{r}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

#-----------------------------
#Data cleaning and naming setup
#---------------------------
```{r}
limma_inputs <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "limma_gsea_inputs_age_sex_study.rds")
)
dat1 <- limma_inputs$primary
meta1 <- dat1$samples
out1 <- dat1$out

prot_log <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "prot_log2.rds")
)

meta1$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta1$record_id))
rownames(prot_log) <- trimws(rownames(prot_log))

prot_mat <- prot_log[meta1$record_id, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(rownames(prot_mat), meta1$record_id))

meta1 <- meta1 %>%
  mutate(
    age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(age)),
    sex = factor(sex),
    study6 = factor(study6),
    group4 = factor(group4, levels = c("LC", "OC", "T1D", "T2D"))
  )
```

```{r}
design <- model.matrix(~ group4, data = meta1)

prot_mat_t <- t(prot_mat)
prot_resid_t <- limma::removeBatchEffect(
  prot_mat_t,
  batch = meta1$study6,
  design = design
)

prot_resid <- t(prot_resid_t)
stopifnot(identical(rownames(prot_resid), meta1$record_id))
dim(prot_resid_t)
```
#----------------------------------------------
#reading in analyte file for easier annotation
#---------------------------------------------
```{r}
analytes <- read.csv(
  file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization", "Combined SomaScan", "analytes.csv")
)

protein2symbol <- analytes %>%
  transmute(
    feature_id = trimws(as.character(AptName)),
    gene_symbol = trimws(as.character(EntrezGeneSymbol))
  ) %>%
  filter(feature_id != "", !is.na(feature_id)) %>%
  distinct(feature_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

#------------------------
#elasticNet function
#------------------------
```{r}
run_elastic_net <- function(
  cc,
  out_list,
  meta_df,
  X_mat,
  protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  alpha_grid = seq(0.1, 1, by = 0.1),
  nfolds = 10,
  seed = 1835,
  min_per_class = 5,
  maxit = 1e6,
  verbose = FALSE
) {
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("\n============================\n")
    cat("Running contrast:", cc, "\n")
  }
  if (!cc %in% names(out_list)) {
    stop("Contrast not found in out_list: ", cc)
  }
  if (!grepl("_vs_", cc)) {
    stop("Contrast name must contain '_vs_'")
  }
  
  parts <- strsplit(cc, "_vs_")[[1]]
  if (length(parts) != 2) {
    stop("Contrast could not be split into two groups")
  }
  
  g_pos <- parts[1]
  g_neg <- parts[2]
  
  idx <- which(meta_df$group4 %in% c(g_pos, g_neg))
  meta_sub <- meta_df[idx, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_sub$record_id <- as.character(meta_sub$record_id)
  meta_sub$group4 <- droplevels(meta_sub$group4)
  
  y <- ifelse(meta_sub$group4 == g_pos, 1, 0)
  y <- as.numeric(y)
  
  tab <- table(meta_sub$group4)
  
  if (any(tab < min_per_class)) {
    stop(
      "Too few samples in at least one class for contrast: ",
      cc,
      " | counts = ",
      paste(names(tab), tab, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  tt <- out_list[[cc]]
  
  if (is.null(tt)) {
    stop("Contrast table is NULL for: ", cc)
  }
  
  tt <- as.data.frame(tt)
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Columns in contrast table:\n")
    print(names(tt))
  }
  
  if (!"feature_id" %in% names(tt)) {
    fid <- rownames(tt)
    if (is.null(fid)) stop("No feature_id column or rownames found")
    tt$feature_id <- fid
  }
  
  if (!all(c("P.Value", "t") %in% names(tt))) {
    stop("Contrast table is missing P.Value and/or t")
  }
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Rows in limma table:", nrow(tt), "\n")
    cat("Overlap with protein matrix:", sum(tt$feature_id %in% colnames(X_mat)), "\n")
  }
  
  top_feats <- tt %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t)) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(protein2symbol, by = "feature_id") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene_symbol = dplyr::if_else(
        is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "",
        feature_id,
        gene_symbol
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(feature_id %in% colnames(X_mat)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(abs(t))) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gene_symbol) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(feature_id)
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Top overlapping features:", length(top_feats), "\n")
    cat("First few top features:\n")
    print(head(top_feats, 10))
  }
  
  if (length(top_feats) < 5) {
    stop("Fewer than 5 overlapping top features for contrast: ", cc)
  }
  
  meta_sub <- meta_sub %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sex = factor(sex),
      study6 = factor(study6)
    )
  
  covars_present <- covars[covars %in% colnames(meta_sub)]
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Covariates used:", paste(covars_present, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
  if (length(covars_present) > 0) {
    form_cov <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(covars_present, collapse = " + ")))
    Z <- model.matrix(form_cov, data = meta_sub)
  } else {
    Z <- matrix(1, nrow = nrow(meta_sub), ncol = 1)
    colnames(Z) <- "(Intercept)"
  }
  
  Xp <- X_mat[meta_sub$record_id, top_feats, drop = FALSE]
  
  X <- cbind(Z, Xp)
  X <- as.matrix(X)
  storage.mode(X) <- "double"
  
  pf <- c(rep(0, ncol(Z)), rep(1, ncol(Xp)))
  
  sds <- apply(X, 2, sd)
  keep <- which(is.finite(sds) & sds > 0)
  
  X <- X[, keep, drop = FALSE]
  pf <- pf[keep]
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Final design matrix dim:", dim(X), "\n")
  }
  
  nfolds_use <- min(nfolds, sum(y == 0), sum(y == 1))
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("nfolds used:", nfolds_use, "\n")
  }
  
  if (nfolds_use < 2) {
    stop("Not enough samples per class for CV")
  }
  
  set.seed(seed)
  
  fit_list <- lapply(alpha_grid, function(a) {
    cv <- tryCatch(
      glmnet::cv.glmnet(
        x = X,
        y = y,
        family = "binomial",
        alpha = a,
        nfolds = nfolds_use,
        type.measure = "deviance",
        penalty.factor = pf,
        standardize = TRUE,
        maxit = maxit
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        if (verbose) {
          message("glmnet failed at alpha = ", a, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
        }
        NULL
      }
    )
    
    if (is.null(cv)) return(NULL)
    
    list(alpha = a, cvfit = cv)
  })
  
  fit_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), fit_list)
  
  if (length(fit_list) == 0) {
    stop("All glmnet fits failed")
  }
  
  best_idx <- which.min(sapply(fit_list, function(z) min(z$cvfit$cvm)))
  best <- fit_list[[best_idx]]
  
  coef_mat <- as.matrix(coef(best$cvfit, s = "lambda.1se"))
  
  coef_df <- tibble::tibble(
    term = rownames(coef_mat),
    beta = as.numeric(coef_mat)
  ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(beta != 0)
  
  protein_terms <- intersect(colnames(Xp), coef_df$term)
  
  p_hat <- as.numeric(
    predict(best$cvfit, newx = X, s = "lambda.1se", type = "response")
  )
  
  auc_val <- as.numeric(
    pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, p_hat, quiet = TRUE))
  )
  
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Best alpha:", best$alpha, "\n")
    cat("AUC:", auc_val, "\n")
    cat("Nonzero coefficients:", nrow(coef_df), "\n")
    cat("Selected protein terms:", length(protein_terms), "\n")
  }
  
  list(
  contrast = cc,
  positive = g_pos,
  negative = g_neg,
  best_alpha = best$alpha,
  lambda_1se = best$cvfit$lambda.1se,
  lambda_min = best$cvfit$lambda.min,
  auc_train = auc_val,
  y = y,
  p_hat = p_hat,
  n_input_proteins = length(top_feats),
  coef_df = coef_df,
  protein_terms = protein_terms,
  cvfit = best$cvfit,
  top_feats = top_feats
)
}
```


```{r}
contrast_order <- c(
  "T1D_vs_LC",
  "T2D_vs_LC",
  "T1D_vs_T2D",
  "OC_vs_LC",
  "T1D_vs_OC",
  "T2D_vs_OC"
)

enet_res <- lapply(contrast_order, function(cc) {
  run_elastic_net(
    cc = cc,
    out_list = out1,
    meta_df = meta1,
    X_mat = prot_resid,
    seed = 1835,
    protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
    top_n = 100,
    verbose = TRUE,
    covars = c("age", "sex")
  )
})

names(enet_res) <- contrast_order
```
```{r}
enet_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(enet_res, function(res) {
    tibble(
      contrast = res$contrast,
      alpha = res$best_alpha,
      lambda_1se = res$lambda_1se,
      lambda_min = res$lambda_min,
      auc = res$auc_train,
      n_input_proteins = res$n_input_proteins,
      n_selected_proteins = length(res$protein_terms)
    )
  })
)

enet_selected <- bind_rows(
  lapply(enet_res, function(res) {
    res$coef_df %>%
      filter(term %in% res$protein_terms) %>%
      rename(feature_id = term) %>%
      left_join(protein2symbol, by = "feature_id") %>%
      mutate(
        contrast = res$contrast,
        abs_beta = abs(beta)
      ) %>%
      arrange(contrast, desc(abs_beta))
  })
)

enet_selected
```
#-----------------------------------------------
#bootstrapping function (100x)
#-----------------------------------------------
```{r}
run_elastic_net_bootstrap <- function(
  cc,
  out_list,
  meta_df,
  X_mat,
  protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  alpha_grid = seq(0.1, 1, by = 0.1),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1835,
  min_per_class = 5, 
  verbose = FALSE) {
  set.seed(seed)
  
  boot_res <- vector("list", n_boot)
  
  for (b in seq_len(n_boot)) {
   
  if (verbose) {
    cat("Bootstrap", b, "of", n_boot, "for", cc, "\n")
    }
    
    parts <- strsplit(cc, "_vs_")[[1]]
    g_pos <- parts[1]
    g_neg <- parts[2]
    
    idx0 <- which(meta_df$group4 %in% c(g_pos, g_neg))
    meta_sub0 <- meta_df[idx0, , drop = FALSE]
    
    # stratified bootstrap: sample within each group
    idx_boot <- unlist(lapply(split(seq_len(nrow(meta_sub0)), meta_sub0$group4), function(ii) {
      sample(ii, size = length(ii), replace = TRUE)
    }))
    
    meta_boot <- meta_sub0[idx_boot, , drop = FALSE]
    meta_boot$record_id_boot <- paste0(meta_boot$record_id, "_boot", seq_len(nrow(meta_boot)))
    
    X_boot <- X_mat[meta_boot$record_id, , drop = FALSE]
    rownames(X_boot) <- meta_boot$record_id_boot
    
    meta_boot$record_id <- meta_boot$record_id_boot
    
    fit_b <- tryCatch(
      run_elastic_net(
        cc = cc,
        out_list = out_list,
        meta_df = meta_boot,
        X_mat = X_boot,
        protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
        top_n = top_n,
        covars = covars,
        alpha_grid = alpha_grid,
        seed = seed + b,
        min_per_class = min_per_class,
        verbose = verbose
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Bootstrap failed at b = ", b, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
        NULL
      }
    )
    
    boot_res[[b]] <- fit_b
  }
  
  boot_res <- Filter(Negate(is.null), boot_res)
  
 selected_tbl <- lapply(seq_along(boot_res), function(i) {
  tibble(
    boot = i,
    contrast = cc,
    best_alpha = boot_res[[i]]$best_alpha,
    auc_train = boot_res[[i]]$auc_train,
    feature_id = unique(boot_res[[i]]$protein_terms)
  )
}) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  distinct(contrast, boot, feature_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  stability_tbl <- selected_tbl %>%
  distinct(contrast, boot, feature_id) %>%
  count(contrast, feature_id, name = "n_selected") %>%
  mutate(
    n_boot_success = length(boot_res),
    selection_frequency = n_selected / n_boot_success
  ) %>%
  left_join(protein2symbol, by = "feature_id") %>%
  arrange(desc(selection_frequency))
  
  stability_tbl <- stability_tbl %>%
  mutate(selection_percent = 100 * selection_frequency)
  
  model_summary <- tibble(
    contrast = cc,
    n_boot_requested = n_boot,
    n_boot_success = length(boot_res),
    mean_auc = mean(sapply(boot_res, function(x) x$auc_train), na.rm = TRUE),
    median_auc = median(sapply(boot_res, function(x) x$auc_train), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_alpha = mean(sapply(boot_res, function(x) x$best_alpha), na.rm = TRUE),
    median_alpha = median(sapply(boot_res, function(x) x$best_alpha), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
  
  list(
    contrast = cc,
    boot_res = boot_res,
    selected_tbl = selected_tbl,
    stability_tbl = stability_tbl,
    model_summary = model_summary
  )
}
```
#----------------------
#boostrapping T1D vs LC
#----------------------
```{r}
boot_T1D_LC <- run_elastic_net_bootstrap(
  cc = "T1D_vs_LC",
  out_list = out1,
  meta_df = meta1,
  X_mat = prot_resid,
  protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1835
)
```

```{r}
boot_T1D_LC$stability_tbl %>%
  filter(selection_frequency >= 0.6)
```
#--------------------------
#boostrapping T1D vs OC
#--------------------------
```{r}
boot_T1D_OC <- run_elastic_net_bootstrap(
  cc = "T1D_vs_OC",
  out_list = out1,
  meta_df = meta1,
  X_mat = prot_resid,
  protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1
)
```

```{r}
boot_T1D_OC$stability_tbl %>%
  filter(selection_frequency >= 0.6)
```
#--------------------------
#boostrapping T1D vs T2D
#--------------------------
```{r}
boot_T1D_T2D <- run_elastic_net_bootstrap(
  cc = "T1D_vs_T2D",
  out_list = out1,
  meta_df = meta1,
  X_mat = prot_resid,
  protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1
)
```

```{r}
boot_T1D_T2D$stability_tbl %>%
  filter(selection_frequency >= 0.6)
```

#--------------------------
#boostrapping T2D vs LC
#--------------------------
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
boot_T2D_LC <- run_elastic_net_bootstrap(
  cc = "T2D_vs_LC",
  out_list = out1,
  meta_df = meta1,
  X_mat = prot_resid,
  protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1
)
```

```{r}
boot_T2D_LC$stability_tbl %>%
  filter(selection_frequency >= 0.6)
```

#--------------------------
#boostrapping T2D vs OC
#--------------------------
```{r}
boot_T2D_OC <- run_elastic_net_bootstrap(
  cc = "T2D_vs_OC",
  out_list = out1,
  meta_df = meta1,
  X_mat = prot_resid,
  protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1
)
```

```{r}
boot_T2D_OC$stability_tbl %>%
  filter(selection_frequency >= 0.6)
```

#--------------------------
#boostrapping OC vs LC
#--------------------------
```{r}
boot_OC_LC <- run_elastic_net_bootstrap(
  cc = "OC_vs_LC",
  out_list = out1,
  meta_df = meta1,
  X_mat = prot_resid,
  protein2symbol = protein2symbol,
  top_n = 100,
  covars = c("age", "sex"),
  n_boot = 100,
  seed = 1
)
```

```{r}
boot_OC_LC$stability_tbl %>%
  filter(selection_frequency >= 0.6)
```

#---------------------------------------
#feature selection frequency plotting funciton
#--------------------------------------
```{r}
plot_stability <- function(
  boot_obj,
  limma_tbl,
  min_freq = 0.6,
  top_n = NULL,
  fdr_cutoff = 0.05
) {
  
  sig_limma <- limma_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < fdr_cutoff) %>%
    dplyr::pull(feature_id) %>%
    unique()
  
  plot_df <- boot_obj$stability_tbl %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      selection_percent = 100 * selection_frequency,
      threshold_group = dplyr::if_else(selection_frequency >= min_freq, "≥60%", "<60%"),
      sig_limma = feature_id %in% sig_limma,
      label = dplyr::if_else(is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "", feature_id, gene_symbol)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(selection_frequency))
  
  if (!is.null(top_n)) {
    plot_df <- plot_df %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n)
  }
  
  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(label = factor(label, levels = rev(label)))
  
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = label, y = selection_percent, fill = threshold_group)) +
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(
      data = plot_df %>% dplyr::filter(sig_limma),
      aes(label = label),
      color = "orange",
      hjust = -0.05,
      size = 4,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("≥60%" = "purple4", "<60%" = "grey70")) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Elastic net feature stability: ", boot_obj$contrast),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Bootstrap selection frequency (%)",
      fill = "Selection"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 22) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(5.5, 80, 5.5, 5.5)
    )
}
```

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=14}
library(ggtext)
p_stability_T1D_LC <- plot_stability(
  boot_obj = boot_T1D_LC,
  limma_tbl = out1$T1D_vs_LC, 
  min_freq = 0.6, top_n = 50)
p_stability_T1D_OC <- plot_stability(
  boot_obj = boot_T1D_OC,
  limma_tbl = out1$T1D_vs_OC,
  min_freq = 0.6, top_n = 50)
p_stability_T1D_T2D <- plot_stability(
  boot_obj=boot_T1D_T2D, 
  limma_tbl = out1$T1D_vs_T2D,
  min_freq = 0.6, top_n = 50)
p_stability_T2D_LC <- plot_stability(
  boot_obj = boot_T2D_LC, 
  limma_tbl = out1$T2D_vs_LC,
  min_freq = 0.6, top_n = 50)
p_stability_T2D_OC <- plot_stability(
  boot_obj =boot_T2D_OC,
  limma_tbl = out1$T2D_vs_OC,
  min_freq = 0.6, top_n = 50)
p_stability_OC_LC <- plot_stability(
  boot_obj = boot_OC_LC,
  limma_tbl = out1$OC_vs_LC,
  min_freq = 0.6, top_n = 50)

stability_plots <- (p_stability_T2D_LC | p_stability_T1D_OC | p_stability_T1D_T2D)/
(p_stability_T2D_LC | p_stability_T1D_OC | p_stability_OC_LC)

stability_plots
ggsave(filename = file.path(dir.results, "Proteomics Figures", "stability_plots.png"),
       plot = stability_plots,
       width = 20,
       height = 18)
```

```{r}
plot_boot_auc <- function(boot_obj) {
  
  auc_df <- tibble(
    contrast = boot_obj$contrast,
    auc = sapply(boot_obj$boot_res, function(x) x$auc_train)
  )
  
  ggplot(auc_df, aes(x = auc)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = median(auc_df$auc, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Bootstrap AUC distribution: ", boot_obj$contrast),
      x = "Training AUC across bootstrap models",
      y = "Number of bootstrap models"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}

```

```{r}
p_auc_T1D_LC <- plot_boot_auc(boot_T1D_LC)
p_auc_T1D_LC

p_auc_T1D_OC <- plot_boot_auc(boot_T1D_OC)
p_auc_T1D_OC

p_auc_T1D_T2D <- plot_boot_auc(boot_T1D_T2D)
p_auc_T1D_T2D

p_auc_T2D_LC <- plot_boot_auc(boot_T2D_LC)
p_auc_T2D_LC

p_auc_T2D_OC <- plot_boot_auc(boot_T2D_OC)
p_auc_T2D_OC

p_auc_OC_LC <- plot_boot_auc(boot_OC_LC)
p_auc_OC_LC

AUC_dist_plots <- (p_auc_T1D_LC | p_auc_T1D_OC | p_auc_T1D_T2D)/
  (p_auc_T2D_LC| p_auc_T2D_OC | p_auc_OC_LC)

AUC_dist_plots
ggsave(filename = file.path(dir.results, "Proteomics Figures", "AUC_distribution_plots.png"),
       plot = AUC_dist_plots,
       width = 18,
       height = 16,
       dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
plot_boot_roc <- function(boot_obj) {
  
  roc_df <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_along(boot_obj$boot_res), function(i) {
    
    res <- boot_obj$boot_res[[i]]
    
    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
      response = res$y,
      predictor = res$p_hat,
      quiet = TRUE
    )
    
    tibble::tibble(
      bootstrap = i,
      specificity = roc_obj$specificities,
      sensitivity = roc_obj$sensitivities,
      auc = as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))
    )
  })
  
  median_auc <- median(
    sapply(boot_obj$boot_res, function(x) x$auc_train),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, group = bootstrap)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Bootstrap ROC curves: ", boot_obj$contrast),
      subtitle = paste0("Median training AUC = ", round(median_auc, 3)),
      x = "False positive rate (1 - specificity)",
      y = "True positive rate (sensitivity)"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}
```

```{r}
p_roc_T1D_LC <- plot_boot_roc(boot_T1D_LC)
p_roc_T1D_LC

p_roc_T1D_OC <- plot_boot_roc(boot_T1D_OC)
p_roc_T1D_OC

p_roc_T1D_T2D <- plot_boot_roc(boot_T1D_T2D)
p_roc_T1D_T2D

p_roc_T2D_LC <- plot_boot_roc(boot_T2D_LC)
p_roc_T2D_LC

p_roc_T2D_OC <- plot_boot_roc(boot_T2D_OC)
p_roc_T2D_OC

p_roc_OC_LC <- plot_boot_roc(boot_OC_LC)
p_roc_OC_LC

ROC_plots <- (p_roc_T1D_LC | p_roc_T1D_OC | p_roc_T1D_T2D)/
  (p_roc_T2D_LC| p_roc_T2D_OC | p_roc_OC_LC)

ROC_plots

ggsave(filename = file.path(dir.results, "Proteomics Figures", "ROC_plots.png"),
       plot = ROC_plots,
       width = 18,
       height = 16,
       dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
plot_alpha_distribution <- function(boot_obj) {
  
  alpha_df <- tibble(
    contrast = boot_obj$contrast,
    alpha = sapply(boot_obj$boot_res, function(x) x$best_alpha)
  )
  
  ggplot(alpha_df, aes(x = factor(alpha))) +
    geom_bar() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Selected alpha values: ", boot_obj$contrast),
      x = "Best alpha",
      y = "Number of bootstrap models"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}

```

```{r}
p_alpha_T1D_LC <- plot_alpha_distribution(boot_T1D_LC)
p_alpha_T1D_LC
p_alpha_T1D_OC <- plot_alpha_distribution(boot_T1D_OC)
p_alpha_T1D_OC
p_alpha_T1D_T2D <- plot_alpha_distribution(boot_T1D_T2D)
p_alpha_T1D_T2D
p_alpha_T2D_LC <- plot_alpha_distribution(boot_T2D_LC)
p_alpha_T2D_LC
p_alpha_T2D_OC <- plot_alpha_distribution(boot_T2D_OC)
p_alpha_T2D_OC
p_alpha_OC_LC <- plot_alpha_distribution(boot_OC_LC)
p_alpha_OC_LC

alpha_plots <- (p_alpha_T1D_LC | p_alpha_T1D_OC | p_alpha_T1D_T2D)/
  (p_alpha_T2D_LC| p_alpha_T2D_OC | p_alpha_OC_LC)

alpha_plots
ggsave(filename = file.path(dir.results, "Proteomics Figures", "alpha_plots.png"),
       plot = alpha_plots,
       width = 18,
       height = 16,
       dpi = 300)
```
